lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: Tread carefully in this hallowed place, traveller. The magicks of the Dark Altar are not to be treated lightly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: The Dark Altar is the treasure of Arceuus. Our forebears spent their lives - literally, in some cases - learning to unlock its secrets and wield its power.

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: The power of the Dark Altar, reflected in these great crystals, can twist dimensions, warp minds, and even bridge the gulf between life and death.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I try the magicks myself?

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: Very well. If you find an ensouled cadaver in your travels, you may attempted to reanimate it with the magicks I have placed in your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to stop using your spellbook now.

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: Very well, the magicks of the Dark Altar have been lifted from your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you sell souvenirs?

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: I suppose you are a friend to us. Free up some space and I will give you something.

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: I suppose you are a friend to us. Here, you may have this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have an ash sanctifier, please?

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: No. You need to complete all of the hard tasks in your Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary.

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: Not unless you make space to carry it, traveller.

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: Thanks for your efforts throughout the tasks set. Here, you may have this.

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: You already appear to own such a device, traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I sacrifice my trophy heads on the altar?

lines.speaker: Tyss
lines.text: Yes, I believe the Dark Altar may even reward you for such a sacrifice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.
